title: memecylon cordatum
intro: Memecylon cordatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Malaysian bryony" or "kayu merah" in its native regions of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which help to relieve fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Memecylon cordatum is prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
